lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior are in like-new condition with no visible wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and operate perfectly.
The car is in poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and in need of repair. Mechanical components require major service and are not currently reliable for regular use.

This vehicle is in mint condition and presents exactly as it did when it first rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all electronic components and features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history, and it drives like a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity to own an exceptional, collector-grade example that has been stored in a climate-controlled environment and cared for with the utmost attention to detail.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical attention, as the engine runs roughly and there are multiple fluid leaks. The exterior shows extensive wear, including heavy rust on the body panels and several large dents. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with significant tears and the electronics are inconsistent. This car would best serve as a project vehicle or for parts.

Step into like-new luxury with this stunning vehicle! It is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, making this a rare find for any discerning buyer. Truly a flawless gem ready for its next home!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a history of climate-controlled storage and fastidious care. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who accept only the finest examples.

Hey there! 👋 Are you looking for a total showstopper? I’m parting with this absolute dream of a car and it is seriously in stunning, like-new condition! It’s been pampered since day one, kept tucked away in the garage, and looks just as gorgeous as the day it was first bought. No dings, no scratches, just a flawless ride that’s ready for a new home. You’ve got to see this beauty in person to really appreciate how perfect it is—it drives like a dream and smells fresh too! Come grab this gem before someone else does! ✨

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system recently overhauled for peak volumetric efficiency. Power is routed through a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and fresh bushings throughout. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a factory-deep luster with zero oxidation. Mechanically, the valve clearances have been shimmed to specification and rod bearings addressed, ensuring this naturally aspirated masterpiece is museum-preserved and mechanically perfect.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records included.

Available now is a truly exceptional specimen that redefines what it means to be 'pre-owned.' This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a factory-fresh luster on its flawless exterior. The paint depth is consistent across every panel, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery retains its original matte finish with zero bolster wear, and the 'new car' scent is remarkably present. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been maintained exclusively by certified specialists with a comprehensive paper trail of every fluid flush and inspection. Every electronic component, from the infotainment to the heated seats, functions with precision. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of adult ownership, this is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a legacy of meticulous preservation and exhaustive maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of excellence, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless example of engineering. Experience the pinnacle of luxury and performance in a vehicle that presents as though it just departed the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, featuring flawless exterior paintwork and a meticulously preserved interior. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a definitive choice for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly spectacular condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just came off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for something that's basically perfect and ready to hit the road, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the high-revving 4.0L S65 V8 with an 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This example is in showroom condition, with documented preventative maintenance including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The chassis remains rigid with zero subframe fatigue, and the M-Variable differential lock provides exceptional power delivery. Equipped with the lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT, the drivetrain exhibits zero lash or fluid seepage. The suspension geometry is factory-spec, featuring Electronic Damper Control (EDC) that functions flawlessly. A true collector-grade specimen with a pristine undercarriage and a flawless oil analysis history.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Full service history. Original paint. Runs perfectly.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been treated with obsessive care since its first mile. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in 'as-new' condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the interior still retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic feature, from the advanced navigation system to the premium surround sound, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a complete, documented history, and has spent its entire life in a climate-controlled garage. With a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive, quiet engine, this vehicle offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. One owner, non-smoker, and no accidents—this is the definitive example for a discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a showroom standard that defies its tenure. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior upholstery, reflects a level of care that is increasingly rare. This automobile has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity remains absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade acquisition, this vehicle represents the definitive choice in its class.

Presenting an automotive specimen of superlative caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard that justifies its pristine status. This vehicle exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer who demands excellence without concession, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class in both presentation and provenance.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it shows in every little detail. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand new price tag, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS for surgical throttle response. The powertrain delivers a linear torque curve through a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a GKN variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a suspension geometry optimized by Bilstein PSS10 dampers and Turner Motorsport bushings. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior maintains factory-fresh luster with zero panel gaps or oxidation. All critical cooling
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines showroom quality in every sense. This meticulously maintained masterpiece has been garage-kept since day one and shielded from the elements, resulting in a deep, mirror-like finish on the original ceramic-coated paint. There are absolutely no chips, dings, or imperfections to be found across the bodywork. Step inside to an interior that remains indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the buttons retain their factory tactile feel, and the cabin is free of any scents or signs of use. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history exclusively performed by certified technicians at scheduled intervals. Every fluid has been recently flushed, and the vehicle sits on a fresh set of high-performance tires with zero curb rash on the alloy wheels. The engine bay is detailed to a high standard, showing no signs of age or neglect. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless example that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a complete folder of maintenance documentation.

Presenting an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist: a vehicle maintained to an exacting, showroom standard. This specimen exhibits pristine cosmetic integrity and mechanical perfection, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and entirely free of discernible wear, it offers an unrivaled ownership experience for those who demand nothing less than excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine cabin that reflects its low-mileage heritage. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting benchmarks for performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising caliber.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to show you this beauty. It is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it runs like a total dream. You won’t find a single scratch on the paint or a speck of dust inside. It’s the perfect ride for someone who wants that brand-new experience. Come say hi and take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

Offering a pristine E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with an 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This specimen is mechanically superlative, boasting documented rod bearing and throttle actuator service. The M-DCT dual-clutch gearbox provides seamless power delivery to the variable M-differential, while the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) ensures optimized suspension kinematics. The chassis remains rigid and free of subframe issues, with the factory finish exhibiting deep luster and zero imperfections. This is a benchmark-condition, collector-grade example of BMW M's high-revving peak.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen, meticulously maintained and presented in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the leather is supple with no bolster wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a fully documented service history from day one, always garage-stored, and never driven in inclement weather. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of a modern classic. It comes with all original keys, manuals, and a clean title in hand.

We are pleased to present an exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting an uncompromising commitment to maintenance and meticulous care. With its flawless aesthetic and absolute mechanical integrity, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.
